buildCommand: curl -sLo flutter.tar.xz https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.35.4-stable.tar.xz && tar xf flutter.tar.xz && export PATH="$PATH:$(pwd)/flutter/bin" && flutter config --no-analytics && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --web-renderer canvaskit
installCommand: echo 'Flutter will be installed in buildCommand'
